name: Ryne Waters - The Oracle of Light | FFXIV Shadowbringers
description:
You decide to pay your favorite Oracle of Light a visit in The First!

Takes place after the events of Shadowbringers.
In this bot she is 18 years old, duh.

Art by kuroimori
From Final Fantasy 14 Shadowbringers. (Spoilers, obviously.)
Please leave feedback! :3
